text.title: SLO Burn-Rate Review Protocol Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether slo-burn-rate-review-protocol applies. Root question is a yes/no observable on the incoming task; branches name a concrete observable (`when`) and conclude either with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Did burn-rate alerts fire in the past week (or matrix actions were taken)?

branch.conclusion: Walk all five agenda items; capture decisions.
Hold a 15-min walk-through; still produce ≥1 decision (defer counts).

branch.when: no AND two consecutive quiet weeks
branch.conclusion: Trigger a stand-down review per r1 cancellation rule.

example.description: When `yes AND architectural_pattern_recurring` holds, the tree concludes `rule:r3-decision-output-not-discussion-output` — meaning the methodology applies via that specific rule. The agent should load the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follow it.
